description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the openjdk:8-jdk Docker image and define the variables ANDROID_BUILD_TOOLS, ANDROID_COMPILE_SDK and ANDROID_SDK_TOOLS. Add a global before_script that quietly updates apt, installs wget, tar, unzip, lib32stdc++6 and lib32z1, downloads the Android SDK tarball for version ${ANDROID_SDK_TOOLS}, extracts it, runs silent SDK updates for android-${ANDROID_COMPILE_SDK}, platform-tools, build-tools-${ANDROID_BUILD_TOOLS}, extra-android-m2repository, extra-google-google_play_services and extra-google-m2repository, sets ANDROID_HOME to the extracted directory, prepends its platform-tools to PATH, and makes ./gradlew executable. Define two stages: build and test. In the build stage add a build job that runs ./gradlew assembleDebug and publishes the app/build/outputs/ directory as an artifact. In the test stage add a unitTests job that runs ./gradlew test, and a functionalTests job that downloads and makes executable the android-wait-for-emulator script, installs the sys-img-x86-google_apis-${ANDROID_COMPILE_SDK} system image, creates an AVD named test, starts the emulator headlessly, waits for it to be ready, sends an unlock keyevent via adb, and finally runs ./gradlew cAT.
